Class StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions<K, V extends Record<K,?>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.stream.StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions<K,V>
Type Parameters:
K - Stream key and Stream field type.
V - Stream value type.
Enclosing interface:
StreamMessageListenerContainer<K, V extends Record<K,?>>
public static class StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions<K, V extends Record<K,?>> extends Object
Options for StreamMessageListenerContainer.
Since:
2.2
Author:
Mark Paluch, Christoph Strobl, Christian Rest, DongCheol Kim, Su Ko
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptionsBuilder<String, MapRecord<String,String,String>> builder()
      Returns:
      a new builder for StreamMessageListenerContainer.StreamMessageListenerContainerOptions.

    • getPollTimeout

      public Duration getPollTimeout()
      Timeout for blocking polling using the BLOCK option during reads.
      Returns:
      the timeout.

    • getBatchSize

      public OptionalInt getBatchSize()
      Batch size polling using the COUNT option during reads.
      Returns:
      the batch size.

    • getKeySerializer

      public RedisSerializer<K> getKeySerializer()

    • getHashKeySerializer

      public RedisSerializer<Object> getHashKeySerializer()

    • getHashValueSerializer

      public RedisSerializer<Object> getHashValueSerializer()

    • getHashMapper

      public @Nullable HashMapper<Object,Object,Object> getHashMapper()

    • getRequiredHashMapper

      public HashMapper<Object,Object,Object> getRequiredHashMapper()

    • hasHashMapper

      public boolean hasHashMapper()

    • getTargetType

      public Class<Object> getTargetType()

    • getErrorHandler

      public ErrorHandler getErrorHandler()
      Returns:
      the default ErrorHandler.

    • getExecutor

      public Executor getExecutor()
      Returns:
      the Executor to run stream polling Tasks. Defaults to SimpleAsyncTaskExecutor.

    • getPhase

      public OptionalInt getPhase()
      Returns:
      the configured phase to use for the container lifecycle or empty if the phase was not specified on the options.
      Since:
      4.0

    • isAutoStartup

      public Optional<Boolean> isAutoStartup()
      Returns:
      the configured autoStartup to use for the container lifecycle or empty if the autoStartup was not specified on the options.
      Since:
      4.0
